title: ScadaAlarm
description: Schema for a SCADA alarm event triggered when a tag value crosses a configured threshold

alarmId.description: Unique identifier for the alarm instance

alarmName.description: Name or label of the alarm

tagId.description: Tag ID that triggered the alarm

activeTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the alarm became active

acknowledgedTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the alarm was acknowledged by an operator

clearedTimestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the alarm condition cleared

triggerValue.description: Tag value at the time the alarm was triggered

engineeringUnits.description: Engineering units of the trigger value

message.description: Human-readable alarm message displayed to operators
message.example: CRITICAL: Reactor inlet pressure PV-101 exceeded 180 PSI limit

acknowledgedBy.description: Username of the operator who acknowledged the alarm

processArea.description: Process area where the alarm occurred

notes.description: Operator notes added during alarm acknowledgment
